name: HBT Financial, Inc.
summary: PART I COMPANY OVERVIEW HBT Financial, Inc. (the Company or "HBT Financial"), a Delaware corporation incorporated in 1982, is a bank holding company headquartered in Bloomington, Illinois that has elected to be regulated as a financial holding company. As of December31, 2025, we had total assets of $5.1billion, loans held for investment of $3.5 billion, and total deposits of $4.4 billion.
